description_long: This is a modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a tan-colored chassis and a long, black barrel. The rifle features a prominent telescopic scope mounted on top, designed for precision aiming at long distances. The stock is ergonomically shaped, likely made from a composite or polymer material, and includes a cheek rest and a rubberized buttpad for recoil absorption. The handguard and receiver area have visible mounting points and screws, indicating modularity for attachments. The magazine is not clearly visible, but the design suggests it uses a detachable box magazine. The overall appearance is sleek and tactical, suitable for urban law enforcement or military use.
description: A tan, modern bolt-action sniper rifle with a long black barrel and a mounted telescopic scope, featuring an ergonomic stock and modular chassis.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, tan chassis, and black barrel with the scope clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the circular scope lens and the alignment of the barrel, with the stock and cheek rest visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, barrel, and the modular features of the chassis, with the buttpad at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the stock, cheek rest, and the back of the scope, with the barrel extending forward.
